Models.Name: Visual Evidence Credibility Model
Models.Description: Assesses the authenticity and evidentiary value of undercover camera footage, documentary video, and visual evidence submitted for broadcast investigations. Evaluates metadata integrity, chain-of-custody compliance, and forensic video analysis results.

Factors.Name: Footage Metadata Integrity
Factors.Description: Validates camera EXIF data, GPS coordinates, and timestamp consistency of undercover and documentary footage

Factors.Name: Chain of Custody Compliance
Factors.Description: Tracks visual evidence handling from initial capture through studio editing to broadcast, ensuring no unauthorized modifications

Factors.Name: Source Reliability Rating
Factors.Description: Historical reliability score of the camera operator or undercover journalist who captured the visual evidence

Factors.Name: Digital Forensics Score
Factors.Description: Results of video forensic analysis detecting deepfakes, splicing, or post-production manipulation

Factors.Name: Geographic Origin Verification
Factors.Description: Validates filming location against claimed investigation site using satellite imagery cross-referencing

Models.Name: Broadcast Risk Model
Models.Description: Evaluates legal, reputational, and regulatory risks of broadcasting investigative content. Assesses defamation exposure, contempt of court risk, compliance with ZICTA broadcast standards, and potential for subject retaliation against journalists.

Factors.Name: Defamation Liability Score
Factors.Description: Assesses the risk of defamation claims arising from broadcast of undercover footage and investigative documentaries

Factors.Name: Subject Political Influence
Factors.Description: Measures the political connections and influence of investigation subjects that could impact post-broadcast legal proceedings

Factors.Name: ZICTA Regulatory Compliance
Factors.Description: Evaluates adherence to Zambia Information and Communications Technology Authority broadcasting standards and content regulations

Factors.Name: Financial Impact Exposure
Factors.Description: Estimates potential financial liability from litigation, regulatory fines, or advertiser withdrawal following investigative broadcast

Factors.Name: Journalist Safety Threat Level
Factors.Description: Assesses physical and digital threats to journalists and production crew based on investigation subject profile

Models.Name: Undercover Operation Security Model
Models.Description: Assesses operational security risks for television undercover investigations. Evaluates cover identity integrity, covert equipment detection probability, extraction contingency plans, and digital communication security for field production teams.

Factors.Name: Cover Identity Robustness
Factors.Description: Evaluates the strength and verifiability of undercover identities used by TV producers and reporters in covert filming operations

Factors.Name: Equipment Detection Probability
Factors.Description: Assesses the likelihood of hidden camera and recording equipment being discovered during undercover operations

Factors.Name: Target Environment Hostility
Factors.Description: Rates the physical danger level of the location and subjects being investigated through undercover filming

Factors.Name: Digital Communication Security
Factors.Description: Evaluates encryption and operational security of communications between field crew and studio production during active operations

Factors.Name: Extraction Contingency Readiness
Factors.Description: Assesses preparedness of emergency extraction plans for undercover journalists if operation is compromised

Factors.Name: Legal Preauthorization Status
Factors.Description: Tracks whether covert filming has obtained necessary internal legal approvals and compliance with Zambian privacy law
